creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sat Mar  2 05:56:28 2013
New Revision: 313199
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313199

Log:
  - Update to 5.10
  - Trim header
  - OptionNG
  
  PR:		176574
  Submitted by:	ports fury

Modified:
  head/benchmarks/stream/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/benchmarks/stream/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/benchmarks/stream/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/benchmarks/stream/Makefile	Sat Mar  2 05:54:37 2013	(r313198)
+++ head/benchmarks/stream/Makefile	Sat Mar  2 05:56:28 2013	(r313199)
@@ -1,11 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:   stream
-# Date created:        10 May 2001
-# Whom:        Scott Flatman <sf@dsinw.com>
-#
+# Created by: Scott Flatman <sf@dsinw.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	stream
-PORTVERSION=	5.9
+PORTVERSION=	5.10
 CATEGORIES=	benchmarks
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.cs.virginia.edu/stream/FTP/Code/
 DISTFILES=	stream.c
@@ -14,21 +11,27 @@ DIST_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}-1.0/${PORTVERSI
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Synthetic benchmark program that measures sustainable memory bandwidth
 
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/stream_bench
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
+NO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes
+
+EXTRACT_CMD=	${CP}
+EXTRACT_BEFORE_ARGS=	#
+EXTRACT_AFTER_ARGS=	${WRKDIR}
+
 PORTDOCS=	stream.c
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/stream_bench
 
-do-extract:
-	@${MKDIR} ${WRKSRC}
-	@${CP} ${_DISTDIR}/stream.c ${WRKSRC}
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 do-build:
-	(cd ${WRKSRC} ; ${CC} ${CFLAGS} -o stream_bench stream.c -lm)
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${CC} ${CFLAGS} -o stream_bench stream.c -lm)
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/stream_bench ${PREFIX}/bin
-.	if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-		${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-		${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTDOCS} ${DOCSDIR}
-.	endif
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} stream_bench ${PREFIX}/bin)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS} ${DOCSDIR})
+.endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/benchmarks/stream/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/benchmarks/stream/distinfo	Sat Mar  2 05:54:37 2013	(r313198)
+++ head/benchmarks/stream/distinfo	Sat Mar  2 05:56:28 2013	(r313199)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (stream-1.0/5.9/stream.c) = 57e44147e1378e8a3d67053be003380466e324aa546663834cf3c405a836852c
-SIZE (stream-1.0/5.9/stream.c) = 11909
+SHA256 (stream-1.0/5.10/stream.c) = a52bae5e175bea3f7832112af9c085adab47117f7d2ce219165379849231692b
+SIZE (stream-1.0/5.10/stream.c) = 19967
